form.formComment: Third race start today. At very long odds at debut, second last of 10 at Gulfstream Park on January 29 over 1308m, 23 len behind Turkish Pistachio carrying 55.5kg at $57.80. Last start 4th of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1673m, 6 len behind Faena with 55.5kg at $31.50. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 7th of 12 at this track on February 7 over 1609m, 6 len behind Tam Tam carrying 55.5kg at $11.10. Last start ran last of 9 at this track on March 1 over 1811m, 39 len behind Candy Rockette with 55.5kg at $6.80. Not doing enough.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 48 day let-up. At the latest run tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 10 at this track on February 27 over 1609m, 0.3 len behind Swing Route carrying 55.5kg at $6. The start before that sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 10 at this track on January 30 over 1609m, 5 len behind Bint Mischief with 55.5kg at $21.70. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months second last of 9 at this track on March 19 over 1673m, 10 len behind Faena with 55.5kg at $11.60. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Delaware Park Turf on August 28 over 1509m, 5.5 len behind Autonome carrying 53.5kg at $28.60. Fitter and worth including.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at this track on February 19 over 1609m, 1.75 len behind Thames carrying 56kg at $4. Second run from a spell 5th of 7 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 21 over 1673m, 8 len behind Big Magic with 57kg at $7.50. Can improve. Top chance if at her best.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 7 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on February 22 over 1106m, 6 len behind Silent Wrath with 56kg at $8.70. Sure to improve and can measure up this time.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at this track on February 19 over 1609m, 0.8 len behind Thames carrying 52.5kg at $30.20. Second-up tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 7 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on March 21 over 1673m, 1.1 len behind Big Magic with 57kg at $6.90. Racing well. Has strong claims.
